prompt: Should I use SQLite or PostgreSQL for a new multi-tenant SaaS app expecting 500 concurrent users and 50GB of data within the first year?

assertions.text: Contains at least 5 unique verifiable source URLs
Contains at least 3 concrete quantitative data points (numbers, benchmarks, statistics)
References at least 1 specific industry standard by name and section
Contains a structured comparison table or matrix
Explicitly states confidence level (percentage or calibrated language)
Addresses at least 1 counterargument or dissenting view
Ends with a clear, specific actionable recommendation
Shows methodology (search queries, code, or reasoning chain)
